message:
fix(test): use f64 tolerance in runtime_telemetry JSON roundtrip proptest

The proptest_event_json_roundtrip_preserves_scalar_details test compared
detail maps with exact equality, but f64 values lose last-digit precision
during JSON serialization roundtrip (e.g., 3.6452435386842077 → 3.645243538684208).
Compare float fields with 1e-10 tolerance instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
